news.title: Trump discussed Iran's Hormuz Strait proposal with top aides, White House says
news.description: The Trump administration has repeatedly insisted that the central goal of the conflict is keeping Iran from ever obtaining a nuclear weapon.

news.title: Ray Dalio says Kevin Warsh shouldn't cut interest rates in a ‘stagflation’ era
news.description: Dalio said that if Kevin Warsh were to cut rates, it would risk damaging confidence in the central bank at a critical moment.

news.title: Micron and Sandisk continue rally as demand for memory expected to persist
news.description: Shares of Micron and Sandisk jumped after Melius Research said in a report that demand for memory will remain strong through the end of the decade.

news.title: Prediction markets prepare to invade one of crypto’s biggest and riskiest trades
news.description: There’s a land grab underway in the U.S. for perpetual futures, one of the biggest and riskiest parts of crypto — and prediction markets want a piece of it.

news.title: Tom Lee says it's 'very probable' stocks will sail past 7,700 this year
news.description: The S&P 500 closed at another record high on Monday as investors look past several headwinds, including the Iran war, according to Tom Lee.

news.title: Trump ballroom lawsuit plaintiff rejects DOJ demand to drop case after 'assassination attempt'
news.description: Trump and others say the proposed White House ballroom would be much more secure than the Washington Hilton Hotel, where Saturday's shooting occurred.

news.title: Stocks making the biggest moves midday: Sandisk, Micron, Verizon, AMD, GE Vernova and more

news.title: Jury selection kicks off in Musk v. Altman trial
news.description: The Musk v. Altman trial kicked off at a federal courthouse in Oakland, California, with jury selection followed by opening arguments.

news.title: European flight prices are falling in short term, Wizz Air boss says
news.description: While many airlines say they are raising prices due to high fuel costs, József Váradi says European airlines are trying to boost demand

news.title: Claire's closes all 154 stores in UK and Ireland with loss of 1,300 jobs
news.description: All of the chain's standalone stores have stopped trading in the UK and Ireland.

news.title: Greggs removes cabinets in shoplifting hotspots
news.description: Greggs is removing display cabinets in London stores that have been most severely hit by shoplifters.

news.title: Superdry co-founder accused of raping woman
news.description: James Holder, 54, is accused of raping the woman after a night out in 2022, but denies the charges.

news.title: Oil prices rise as US-Iran peace talks stall
news.description: President Trump said the US had cancelled plans to send a team to Pakistan for negotiations.

news.title: How climate change threatens the economic backbone of the Pacific
news.description: Tuna populations around the Pacific Islands could move away as ocean temperatures increase.

news.title: Less bread and WFH Fridays – what Pret boss knows about our habits
news.description: Customers want great value but that doesn't necessarily mean the cheapest products, says Pano Christou.

chinaNews.title: 美光与闪迪股价持续走高，存储芯片需求有望长期旺盛
chinaNews.description: 受梅利厄斯研究机构研判——存储芯片高需求或将延续至本世纪20年代末，存储芯片巨头美光、闪迪本周一股价再度大涨，延续长期上涨行情。
